title: Universities and shops are closing WAY too early

replies.msg:
Do you think this is their tactic to protestors "being water" every night? Nothing opens at night, nothing get destroyed at night, nowhere to hide at night, less and less people come out at night; then in the morning everyone goes to work and school again.

Not to mention less and less "flower" "blooms" recently if that's the plan they are succeeding
I think the government is trying to produce an "illusion" which the protesters disrupting the citizens...
